hero.tagline: Building the bridge between the German-speaking world and MENA.
marquee.home: Cinematic websites · AI ad videos · Music production · DACH × MENA
services.title: What we build for businesses
services.aivideo.title: AI ad videos
services.aivideo.body: Modular ad clips for social media (Reels, TikTok ads). Produced within 48 hours through AI-powered pipelines.
services.websites.title: Websites that win clients
services.websites.body: Landing pages and websites for local businesses, optimized directly for customer acquisition. Cinematic, fast, GDPR-clean.
services.boost.title: Digital Boost (bundle)
services.boost.body: Website + 3 AI ad videos, as subscription or fixed price. One partner for your entire digital presence.
services.artists.title: For artists & labels
services.artists.body: High-end music production with a cross-cultural sound, cinematic music videos (AI for VFX & post-production), documentary content coverage and podcast production.
teaser.label: Soon
contact.title: Contact
contact.body: One partner for your entire digital presence. Write to us — we'll get back to you.
connect.title: Let's build something.
connect.body: FPMC connects film, music and AI — and the German-speaking world with MENA. Artist, brand or creative partner: if you want to make something exceptional, reach out.
